Блок4-27 Как это работает за 3 шага.scriptText:
Три шага к своему дому.

Выбрал участок на карте.

Проверил оценку и сделал ставку.

Построил дом. Всё на Торги Земли.
Блок4-27 Как это работает за 3 шага.whiskPrompts:
Cinematic 3D holographic map of RUSSIA with one glowing golden pin marker highlighted, dark premium background — the RECOGNIZABLE geographic outline of the Russian Federation in CORRECT orientation: north at the TOP, Kaliningrad and the Baltic coast on the LEFT edge, Kamchatka and Chukotka on the FAR RIGHT, the familiar wide horizontal shape of Russia, NOT flipped, NOT mirrored, NOT rotated, NOT upside down, no readable text, no letters, no flags, no watermark --ar 9:16
Cinematic aerial over a green plot with a glowing abstract gauge ring of light above it, premium data look, no readable text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no village --ar 9:16
Early construction stage of ONE modern single-story house with flat roof on a REAL green land plot: fresh concrete foundation and clean structural frame, the surroundings are open green meadows and LIGHT airy birch and pine forest FAR in the background with a few small modern low-rise cottages in the far distance, NO dense village, NO town, NO streets with houses nearby, NO vines, NO climbing plants, REAL FULL-SIZE life-size construction in a REAL outdoor landscape, NOT a miniature, NOT a scale model, NOT a diorama, NOT a model on a pedestal, real ground, real sky, golden hour, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16
A Slavic European family with light skin on the wooden terrace of THE EXACT SAME finished modern single-story flat-roof house at sunset — THE EXACT SAME surroundings as the previous frame: the same open green meadows and the same light airy forest FAR in the background with the same few small modern cottages in the far distance, NOTHING about the environment changes, cozy warm lights, landscaped green yard, REAL FULL-SIZE life-size building in a REAL outdoor landscape, NOT a miniature, NOT a scale model, NOT a diorama, real ground, real sky, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no letters, no flags, no watermark, no old wooden houses, no village --ar 9:16

The holographic map of Russia with a highlighted glowing pin gently rotates, ALWAYS staying in correct readable orientation — the map NEVER flips, NEVER turns upside down, NEVER mirrors, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Aerial over the plot, the glowing gauge ring pulses, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Almost still living-photo of the single-story house at its frame stage: the house holds EXACTLY its shape and its SINGLE-STORY height with a STRICTLY FLAT roof — ONE story only, NEVER grows taller, NEVER gains a second floor, NO trusses, the frame stays perfectly RIGID and intact, the house is NEVER dismantled, NO debris, NO collapse, NO reverse, the surroundings and background stay THE SAME throughout, NO vines or plants grow on the house, REAL full-size building in a real landscape, NOT a miniature, only faint light shift, fixed locked-off camera, absolutely steady, NO camera shake, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
Real family on the terrace of the real full-size house at sunset, warm lights, camera slowly pulls back, the environment stays the same, photorealistic 4K, no on-screen text, no music, no voices
